title: Checking and Savings Balance Access Policy
content: Members can view current and available balances instantly in online banking and mobile app. Phone support can disclose balances only after identity verification using member ID, last 4 digits of SSN, and one-time passcode.

title: Debit Card Locked After Failed PIN Attempts
content: Debit cards are temporarily locked for 24 hours after 3 consecutive failed PIN attempts. Members can request immediate reactivation by completing identity verification and answering card security questions with an agent.

title: Transaction Dispute and Chargeback Procedure
content: For unrecognized card transactions, members must submit a dispute within 60 calendar days from statement date. Provisional credit is typically issued within 10 business days while investigation is in progress.

title: Personal Loan Application Status Timeline
content: Personal loan applications are usually reviewed within 3 to 7 business days. If additional documents are needed, status remains pending until documents are received and validated.

title: Address Change Requirements
content: To update a registered address, members must provide a government-issued photo ID and proof of residence dated within the last 90 days (utility bill, bank statement, or lease). Online updates may require multi-factor authentication.

title: Fixed Deposit Early Closure Penalty
content: Early closure of fixed deposits before maturity incurs a penalty equal to 1.5% of the principal amount or forfeiture of accrued interest for the current quarter, whichever is higher.

title: Escalation and Complaint Resolution SLA
content: Complex complaints are escalated to Tier-2 support with a target first response in 4 business hours and a full resolution target of 5 business days. Repeated unresolved complaints are automatically flagged as high priority.

title: Account Freeze for Suspicious Activity
content: Accounts may be temporarily restricted if fraud-monitoring systems detect abnormal transactions, unusual geolocation shifts, or rapid failed authentication attempts. Members must complete enhanced verification to restore full access.

title: Member Contact Information Update Rules
content: Phone number and email updates can be completed digitally after two-factor authentication. Changes to legal name, address, or tax residency require manual review and supporting documents.

title: Debit Card International Usage and Blocks
content: International transactions may be declined if travel notice is not enabled. Members can request temporary international card enablement for up to 30 days after identity verification.

title: Direct Deposit Posting Window
content: Direct deposits post between 12:00 AM and 9:00 AM local time on business days. Delays can occur on bank holidays or when payer files are received after cutoff.

title: Digital Banking Access Recovery
content: If online access is locked, members can reset credentials using secure recovery. After 5 failed login attempts, account access is locked for 30 minutes or until identity verification with support.
